projectDescription: A Cookiecutter template that generates production-ready Django projects with configurable integrations for Docker, Celery, cloud storage, CI tools, and more.
keyFeatures: Production-ready Django project scaffold with 100% starting test coverage
Docker and Docker Compose support for local and production environments
Configurable cloud storage (AWS S3, GCP, Azure) for static and media files
Optional Celery + Flower task queue integration
Multiple email service backends via django-anymail (Mailgun, SendGrid, SES, etc.)
REST API support with Django REST Framework or Django Ninja
Frontend pipeline options: Webpack, Gulp, or Django Compressor
Custom user model with django-allauth (username or email-based auth)
CI/CD configuration for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Travis, and Drone
publicApiSurface: cookiecutter.json template variables: project_name, project_slug, description, author_name, domain_name, email, version
cookiecutter.json options: use_docker, use_celery, use_sentry, use_whitenoise, use_heroku, use_mailpit, use_async
cookiecutter.json choices: cloud_provider (AWS/GCP/Azure/None), mail_service, rest_api (None/DRF/Django Ninja), frontend_pipeline, ci_tool, postgresql_version
hooks/post_gen_project.py: post-generation cleanup and secret generation
Environment variables: DATABASE_URL, DJANGO_SECRET_KEY, DJANGO_DEBUG, DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS, DJANGO_ADMIN_URL
Environment variables: MAILGUN_API_KEY, SENDGRID_API_KEY, SENTRY_DSN, CELERY_FLOWER_USER/PASSWORD
Generated project: config/settings/base.py, local.py, test.py, production.py
Generated project: <project_slug>/users/ (custom user model, tasks, views)
